target: 8.Shide

Ugh…
Cheating, huh? Shinpei-kun…
It's just going in circles again.
Returning home and coming this far already?

But well, calm down.
Have some green tea. Sit for a while.
Don't worry, there's no poison in it.
You're admitting it!?
Huh… It seems Hishigata-sensei told everything.
…Ha?

Back then… 
I was forty years old.

It was the summer of 1732.  
The year when "the Great Famine of Kyoho" occurred.

Do you know about it?
It's in your Japanese history textbooks.

It was a terrible harvest…
Many people died of starvation.

The adults who went fishing died,  
and the fish also stopped coming. 
That's when it became pure hell.
…But Haine appeared then.
In this island, people believed that gods inhabited things washed ashore from the sea…
Haine was literally a god.

And she ate people.  
In return, it brought bountiful fishing…
Ah… That legend is wrong.

I just turned a few hundred islanders into shadows.  
If you're a shadow, even without fishing boats or nets,
you can catch fish…
It could save starving people.
This island exists because of me.

You bastard!  
Thinking you're doing the right thing?!

Then why…!? 
Why did you kill Shinpei's parents?!?
Because they were an obstacle, just like Ushio.

I discovered the Hiruko Cave… and tried to publicize it.  
If I hadn't done those unnecessary things,
I might have lived longer…

They were foolish people, but
my mother enjoyed eating them.
Ah…
Maybe it would have been better if I had turned you into a shadow?
I… I'm different…

I don't want to kill anyone…
You wouldn't want to die either, right?!
Why?! Why are you protecting Haine so much!?

You're a human… You can't go back to where
Haine came from…

Even if Haine dies,
you won't die either!

Give me Haine…
Then… we can end this.

That's not my ending.  
It is my duty to fulfill mother's wish.

(You bastard!
You damn bastard!!)

Also, I don't know.
Maybe my shadow is here too.
(…Something's wrong…)

Pull the trigger!
There's no shadow nearby!!!
(Why? Why is this guy…)

Shoot him, Shinpei!!  
This is our only chance to defeat Shide!!
I know what you're thinking right now.
"Why doesn't he have a burn on his left hand?"
…That's it.

By the way, Shinpei-kun.  
Can I move now?

That's it! 
I can't hold back anymore!!
Ushio, wait--

He's dead…
…Is this the end?

I'll do it.
You know I said that, right?

I never wanted to let you…
do this…
Shinpei's definitely a murderer now.

Why!!?  
He was mine…
My enemy…!!!
Shinpei's kind, so he must be regretting it.

You see him as a human?
Even me… even this guy…
Let me take the dirty work!

Hah… Hah…
Ku… hah!!
Shinpei!
U, Ushio… I…
(…I shot someone…)
(…But why does he have no burn on his…
(…He doesn't have a burn at all!?)

Stay calm.
Take slow, deep breaths…
Ah… right…
Suuu…
Haaah…
Are you calm now?

Yeah… sorry…
I must've looked pathetic.
…Maybe I should have done it instead.
W-why…?

Because you're kind…
You must be regretting it so much right now, huh?
That's…

It's because you see us as humans.
Even me, even this guy…
So…
From now on, I'll take all the dirty work.
Ushio…

Lend me!
The phone's still connected, right?
Hey everyone… I was listening.
Shide killed…
…What?
…Shinpei…
Yes, one down.
Shi… De…

I'm sorry… Shinpei…
I didn't notice…

That's too bad…
Shinpei-kun.

Just a little…  
You weren't careful enough--
That's not it, is it?
(…How…)
Now.
How does it feel, Shinpei-kun?

Like the save data before the final boss,
a little kid's feeling?
Ushio is dead.
Do you think those hungry ghosts can change my ending?
It's okay, Shinpei…
No matter what…
I'm following you…

If we loop together,
it's only despair and regret…
Goodbye.
KEY TIPS[<color=#GF_KEY_LOOPEND_07>7th END</color>] obtained.
